testcase.name: EvaluationChain should handle no evaluation performed
EvaluationChain should handle entity Fail outcome with evaluation reason
EvaluationChain evaluateEntity should extract entity and evaluate
EvaluationChain should handle payload extraction error
EvaluationChain should handle mixed evaluation types
EvaluationChain should handle entity context access
EvaluationChain should handle entity extraction failure
EvaluationChain should handle multiple error handlers
EvaluationChain should handle data quality failure outcome
EvaluationChain evaluate should handle successful evaluation
EvaluationChain should handle Fail outcome and create evaluation reason
EvaluationChain should handle null error handler
EvaluationChain should handle reason attachment strategies
EvaluationChain evaluate should handle failed evaluation
EvaluationChain should skip second evaluation if first succeeds
EvaluationChain should handle evaluation with different failure types
EvaluationChain should handle fluent chaining
EvaluationChain should handle null reason attachment strategy
EvaluationChain should handle evaluation exception
EvaluationChain should handle entity evaluation exception
EvaluationChain should handle structural failure outcome
EvaluationChain should use custom error handler
EvaluationChain should handle error propagation through chain
EvaluationChain should use custom error handler when no evaluation performed
EvaluationChain should handle context access in evaluations
EvaluationChain should initialize with extracted payload
EvaluationChain should skip evaluation if error already exists
